description_long: This is a small, two-story convenience store with a weathered, gray exterior and a slanted, corrugated black roof featuring patches of discoloration. The front facade is adorned with a red-and-white striped awning above large glass display windows, and a prominent sign with Asian characters and food illustrations mounted above the entrance. A blue-tinted, segmented ventilation duct runs vertically along the side, connecting the roof to the lower level. The building's side walls show visible cracks and copper-colored piping, adding to its aged, urban character. A small hanging sign and a partially open service window further emphasize its function as a street-facing retail establishment.
description: A compact, weathered convenience store with a striped awning, large glass windows, and a prominent sign with Asian characters, featuring visible piping and a slanted roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped awning, large glass windows, main signage with Asian characters, and the entrance area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue ventilation duct, copper piping, wall cracks, and the edge of the awning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slanted, patchy roof and plain gray back wall with minimal features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing more copper piping, wall cracks, the side of the awning, and a hanging sign.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large, rectangular sign with black Asian characters and food illustrations, mounted above the awning; white background with black text and simple graphics; no visible illumination.
attribute_display_windows: Large glass display windows on the front facade, framed in dark material, transparent, with no visible advertisements.
